stemHtml: How can an operator ensure that crew members are able to minimise the consequences of unlawful interference?

options.a: By establishing and maintaining an approved security training programme.
options.b: By including law enforcement or in-flight security officers carrying weapons on every flight.
options.c: By training crew members in the use of weapons if authorised for carriage on board.
options.d: By establishing effective corrective action after each unlawful incident.
